name: Shadow Circular Volta

notes: Incline to the center of the circle. Head, looking toward the direction of the foot movement. Person in the inside use smaller steps.

steps.action: Begin circular volta to the right in R shadow position, moving left across the floor
comments: Incline to the center of the circle. Head, looking toward the direction of the foot movement.
Person in the inside use smaller steps.
